LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-30-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY" IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY THE TRANSFER FEES. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Motion To Transfer Venue To San Diego County
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.'s Motion To Transfer Venue To San Diego County.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to transfer venue to San Diego County" is granted; plaintiff shall pay the transfer fees.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
